name: Five Cup Bread
recipeInstructions:
To make self-rising flour, mix together 1 cup all-purpose flour, 1/4 teaspoon baking powder, 1/4 teaspoon baking soda, and 1/4 teaspoon salt. Use this mixture as 1 cup self-rising flour.
Use dried raisins, apricots, or any other dried fruit you have on hand for the dried fruit component. Granola can be Meusli, homemade granola, high fiber commercial granola, or plain rolled oats. Combine all ingredients to form a soupy mixture and pour into a large loaf pan. Bake at 350°F for approximately 1 hour. Serve with butter.
